response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and his current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare and directly relevant match for this position's AI agent requirement. He demonstrates deep TDD discipline, open-source leadership, and polyglot proficiency across many languages. Key gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions, no Kotlin on the resume, and Python is missing from his listed skills, but his demonstrated learning velocity and architectural breadth make these gaps bridgeable for a motivated candidate of his seniority.
strengths: Current role involves AI agent development and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent experience requirement
15+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React work with proven cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong TDD culture and testing discipline evidenced by authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), workshops, and consistent application across multiple roles
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is the primary backend framework in the required stack
Kotlin and Python — both listed as required proficiencies — are absent from the resume's skills section
Vitest is not mentioned; testing experience leans toward custom D-language frameworks and general TDD practice rather than the specified JS testing stack
